name: John LaBarbera
abstract: John LaBarbera (born November 10, 1945) is an American trumpeter, composer and arranger who worked with the Buddy Rich Orchestra during the late 1960s.

about_quotes.speaker: Curtis Fuller
about_quotes.evidence: Now, my good friend, we worked together at Skidmore, John LaBarbera.
about_quotes.doc_title: Curtis Fuller — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
